description.en: During the START Hack in St. Gallen, our team took on a challenge for the United Nations G20 Global Land Initiative. We focused on the Sahel region in Africa, where desertification makes land management incredibly difficult. Our solution was a dashboard that simplifies years of complex satellite data into clear, actionable guidance for local decision-makers. As the UX designer, I focused on the overall concept and making sure the data was actually easy to understand and use. I also led our final presentation, where we successfully pitched a working prototype that we built from scratch during the hackathon.

Our solution was a dashboard that simplifies years of complex satellite data into clear, actionable guidance for local decision-makers. As the UX designer, I focused on the overall concept and making sure the data was actually easy to understand and use. I also led our final presentation, where we successfully pitched a working prototype that we built from scratch during the hackathon.

content.en: Though we didn't have much time we were able to develop a fully functional prototype with a working front- and backend.
content.de: Obwohl wir nicht viel Zeit hatten, konnten wir einen voll funktionsfähigen Prototyp mit funktionierendem Front- und Backend entwickeln.
